acceptTooltip: Accept this student (e.g. to budget, grant, or other position) and send a congratulatory message
acceptHint: Choose the position type and write a congratulatory message. The student will see it in the chat and receive a notification.
congratulatoryPlaceholder: Congratulations! We are pleased to offer you...
readOnlyRejected: This university closed the chat after rejecting your application. You can still read the conversation, but you can no longer send messages.
readOnlyGeneric: This chat is read-only. You can still view the conversation, but you cannot send new messages.
